Interface IHistoryqouteEntityBaseAccess<S extends Securitycurrency<S>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of security or currency, must extend Securitycurrency
All Known Subinterfaces:
IHistoryquoteEntityAccess<S>
All Known Implementing Classes:
CurrencypairJpaRepositoryImpl, SecuritycurrencyService, SecurityJpaRepositoryImpl
public interface IHistoryqouteEntityBaseAccess<S extends Securitycurrency<S>>
Base access interface for historical quote entity operations.

Provides low-level data access methods for querying and updating historical quote data for securities and currency pairs. This interface abstracts database operations related to identifying instruments that need historical data updates and loading their quote history.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    catchUpSecurityCurrencypairHisotry(S securitycurrency, LocalDate fromDate, LocalDate toDate)
    Loads a security or currency pair with its historical quotes and retrieves additional missing prices.
    List<SecurityCurrencyMaxHistoryquoteData<S>>
    getMaxHistoryquoteResult(short maxHistoryRetry, BaseHistoryquoteThru<S> baseHisotryquote, List<Integer> idsStockexchange)
    Retrieves securities or currency pairs that require historical quote updates.

  • Method Details

    • getMaxHistoryquoteResult

      List<SecurityCurrencyMaxHistoryquoteData<S>> getMaxHistoryquoteResult(short maxHistoryRetry, BaseHistoryquoteThru<S> baseHisotryquote, List<Integer> idsStockexchange)
      Retrieves securities or currency pairs that require historical quote updates.

      Queries for instruments based on retry limit, historical quote threshold criteria, and optionally filtered by stock exchanges. Returns metadata including the maximum historical quote date for each instrument.

      Parameters:
      maxHistoryRetry - maximum number of retry attempts allowed for failed downloads
      baseHisotryquote - criteria for determining which instruments need updates
      idsStockexchange - list of stock exchange IDs to filter by (null = all exchanges)
      Returns:
      list of securities/currencies with their maximum historical quote dates

    • catchUpSecurityCurrencypairHisotry

      S catchUpSecurityCurrencypairHisotry(S securitycurrency, LocalDate fromDate, LocalDate toDate)
      Loads a security or currency pair with its historical quotes and retrieves additional missing prices.

      Fetches the instrument's existing historical data and calls the appropriate method to load any missing quotes within the specified date range.

      Parameters:
      securitycurrency - the security or currency pair to update
      fromDate - start date for historical data retrieval
      toDate - end date for historical data retrieval
      Returns:
      the security or currency pair with updated historical quotes
